---
title: "John Nonono"
---

## John Nonono

### Description

Melanesian missionary

### Biography

He accompanied the Rt. Rev. [[person:1155]John Coleridge Patteson] on the journey on which he was killed.  His name is sometimes written Ngongono.

### Letters

- Letter from 14 May 1872

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
